header.searchSubtitle: Browse real shop and technician profiles near you

search.resultFallback: Filtered from the latest shop and technician profiles in the system
search.emptyDescription: Try clearing some filters or changing your search term to see more available shops and technicians

home.heroDescription: The list below comes from real shops and technicians who have already completed their profile setup. Filter by service, area, starting price, and availability.

home.pageDescription: Find aircon technicians and service shops in Thailand, compare services and starting prices, and send service requests from a mobile-friendly web app.
home.itemListName: Aircon technicians and service shops on Homex
home.seoTitle: Find aircon technicians and service shops across Thailand
home.seoDescription: Homex lists real technician and shop profiles with services, service areas, and starting prices, so customers can compare before sending a request.

faq.question: What can I do on Homex?
faq.answer: Homex helps customers find aircon technicians, compare shop profiles, review services and starting prices, and send service requests from mobile devices.

faq.question: Can customers search by area?
faq.answer: Yes. Customers can filter by service area, service type, availability, and starting price on the search page.

faq.question: What should a shop set up to appear in search?
faq.answer: Shops should complete their shop name, technician profile, services offered, starting prices, and service areas so their public profile appears clearly in search.

search.pageDescription: Find aircon technicians and service shops, then filter by area, service type, and starting price.

province.pageDescription: Find aircon technicians and service shops in {province}, review services offered and starting prices, and compare real profiles before sending a request on Homex.
province.seoDescription: Profiles of shops and technicians serving {province}, with services offered, starting prices, and real service areas from Homex profiles.
